title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food Holdings Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food Holdings Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food Holdings Services! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food Holdings Services:
ID Fresh Food Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food Holdings Services!
